nasb.text: Now you followed my teaching, conduct, purpose, faith, patience, love, perseverance,

esv.text: You, however, have followed my teaching, my conduct, my aim in life, my faith, my patience, my love, my steadfastness,

cnv.text: 但是，你已經了解我的教訓、品行、志向、信心、寬容、愛心和忍耐，

ccb.text: 但你熟知我的教导、言行、志向、信心、忍耐、爱心、毅力，

csbs.text: 至于你，你跟从了我的教导、品行、心意、信仰、宽容、爱心、忍耐，
